india_trends.title: Logistics firms enter last mile for IPO delivery, rev up for Rs 9,000 crore issues
india_trends.summary: India's logistics sector is poised for a significant IPO cycle, with several companies preparing to raise an estimated ₹8,000-9,000 crore. Driven by improving demand and a supportive policy environment, firms like Horizon Industrial Parks, Leap India, and Shiprocket are leading the fundraising wave.

india_trends.title: Arohan Financial plans to file for IPO within a month
india_trends.summary: Microfinance firm Arohan Financial Services is preparing to file for a ₹1,400-crore IPO within a month, aiming for a ₹600 crore primary issue and ₹800 crore offer for sale. This move follows a recovery in the microfinance sector after significant asset quality stress over the past two years.

india_trends.title: Small & micro-caps charge to the front, bluechips need a FPI reload
india_trends.summary: Indian small and micro-cap stocks are bouncing back strongly after the West Asia conflict. Mid-cap shares are also nearing their pre-war highs. This recovery is powered by local investors returning to these beaten-down stocks. However, large blue-chip companies are still lagging behind. Foreign inve

india_trends.title: Netflix co-founder Hastings exits as streaming pioneer hunts for growth
india_trends.summary: Netflix Chairman Reed Hastings has announced he will step down from the streaming company he co-founded 29 years ago, at a time when the firm is facing slowing growth, rising competition and investor pressure after a failed merger attempt with Warner Bros Discovery.

india_trends.title: Stocks in news: Wipro, HUL, Angel One, Alembic Pharma, HDFC Life
